ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of algorithm */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the algorithm */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithms_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the algorithm on the game */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "training_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to train the algorithm (in seconds) */,
  "number_of_episodes" INTEGER /* Number of episodes used for training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DQN variant */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base algorithm (DQN) */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the DQN variant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the DQN variant */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of variant */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the variant */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the variant was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_variants_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_variants_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_performance" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DQN variant */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the DQN variant on the game */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "training_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to train the variant (in seconds) */,
  "number_of_episodes" INTEGER /* Number of episodes used for training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_performance_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES algorithm_variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the researcher */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the researcher started working with the company */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the researcher left the company (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation */,
  "training_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to train the algorithm (in seconds) */,
  "number_of_episodes" INTEGER /* Number of episodes used for training */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment or setup used for the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DQN variant */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation */,
  "training_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to train the variant (in seconds) */,
  "number_of_episodes" INTEGER /* Number of episodes used for training */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment or setup used for the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_evaluations_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_evaluations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_evaluations_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES algorithm_variants ("variant_id")
)
